creator: agnius@ezona.eu
text:
Sorry, I was busy

 

[root@error ~]# cd /usr/obj/usr/src/sys/ROUTER/

[root@error /usr/obj/usr/src/sys/ROUTER]# kgdb kernel.debug

Previous frame inner to this frame (corrupt stack?)

(kgdb)

 

I have 2 hdd

/dev/ad4s1a          496M    148M    308M    32%    /

/dev/ad4s1e          496M     32K    456M     0%    /tmp

/dev/ad4s1f          5.8G    2.6G    2.7G    49%    /usr

/dev/ad0s1           144G     94G     39G    71%    /usr/home

/dev/ad4s1g           62G     32G     26G    55%    /usr/home/agnius

/dev/ad4s1d          1.9G    804M    1.0G    44%    /var

 

My server -(100 lan)--> my pc

 


I connect to ftp, and downloading... (/usr/home/agnius), if I go to
/usr/home/samba, for example listing music, in the same time, system crash.
Maby this is coincidence
